headline: Hormel Foods Completes Sale of Whole-Bird Turkey Business to Life-Science Innovations
summary: Hormel Foods Corporation (NYSE: HRL), a Fortune 500 global branded food company, today announced it has completed the previously announced sale of its whole-bird turkey business to Willmar, Minn.-based Life-Science Innovations (LSI).

headline: Life-Science Innovations, LLC acquired Whole-Bird Turkey Business of Hormel Foods Corporation.
summary: Life-Science Innovations, LLC entered into a definitive agreement to acquire Whole-Bird Turkey Business of Hormel Foods Corporation on February 13, 2026. The purchase price consists of cash at...
